title: Pastel Seashell Pattern Design
prompt: A playful pattern of seashells in pastel colors, illustrated on cream-colored paper with subtle textures for depth and dimension. The design includes various shades of pink, blue, red, yellow, white, green, and orange, creating an airy feel that evokes the ocean's surface. Each shell is drawn with delicate lines, giving it movement and dimension while maintaining simplicity and elegance. This wallpaper would be perfect as an accent wall or in rooms where fun coastal decor is desired. --chaos 10 --ar 9:16 --v 7 --profile srgmnr5
